identities.name: ua-app
identities.operator_signal: Public VM workload pivot; direct control visible.
identities.next_review: Check permissions for direct control on this identity, then vms for the host context behind the workload pivot.
identities.summary: VM 'vm-web-01' gives a public workload pivot into managed identity 'ua-app'. Current scope already shows direct control through high-impact roles (Owner). Check permissions for direct control on this identity, then vms for the host context behind the workload pivot.

findings.title: Managed identity has elevated role assignment
findings.description: Identity 'ua-app' is assigned one or more high-impact roles (Owner).
